title: astragalus trichopodus var. phoxus
intro: Astragalus trichopodus var. phoxus, also known as Huang Qi, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus trichopodus var. phoxus include improving immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. It can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
